list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Explosion and QOL update.
Explosion damage is now more consistent vertically and when hitting entities directly. Increased explosion damage reduction with distance. Slightly reduced grenade throw velocity. Guns now consume ammo, can't be fired when empty and show infinite reserve ammo when in creative. Guns now display their fire mode even if they don't have multiple modes. Changed default attachments screen keybind. Rebalanced explosion damage and radius. Tweaked tags.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "ASKED_MARK_IGNORED_FILES_AS_EXCLUDED": "true", "Gradle.C:/Users/An0m3L1/Documents/GitHub/CGM-plus [createMcpToSrg].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CGM-plus [build].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CGM-plus [createMcpToSrg].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CGM-plus [runClient --warning-mode'none'].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CGM-plus [runClient].executor": "Run", "Gradle.Download Sources.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Run Minecraft 2.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Run Minecraft.executor": "Run", "JavaClassFindUsagesOptions.isSearchForTextOccurrences": "false", "Notification.DisplayName-DoNotAsk-Build sync orphan modules": "Modules no longer referenced by external system", "Notification.DisplayName-DoNotAsk-gradle.notifications.sources.download.failed": "Sources download failed", "Notification.DoNotAsk-Build sync orphan modules": "true", "Notification.DoNotAsk-gradle.notifications.sources.download.failed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/An0m3L1/Documents/GitHub/CGM-plus/run/resourcepacks/WIP Resources/assets/cgm/models/special", "project.structure.last.edited": "Modules", "project.structure.proportion": "0.0", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.0", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager" } }

task.summary: Default task
Small tweak to gunfire light.
Fixed datapack validation errors. More code changes in preparation for wallbang changes. Projectiles now continue flying if they destroy a fragile block (WIP).
Fixed datapack validation errors. More code changes in preparation for wallbang changes. Projectiles now continue flying if they destroy a fragile block (WIP).

Datagen update and fixes, sounds clean up.
Removed chests, barrels and logs from fragile tag. Refactored ModSounds. Flyby sounds no longer play for rockets and pipe grenades. Optimized sounds.json. Preparing to overhaul sniper rifle. Updated and added datagen for: - Block tags - Entity tags - Guns (partially)

Player behavior update.
Moved ModTags to init. Added PlayerHandler and finished working on heavy item tag. Player no longer can sprint while crawling. Added spawnCasings property to guns (WIP).

Dynamic light update.
Rockets and fire grenades now produce light when flying/thrown. Guns now produce light when shot. Explosions now produce light.

Dynamic light and durability fixes.
Guns and attachments can't be enchanted now. Gunfire light visual effect is now tied to config value. Changed repair kit recipe and model. Fixed bug that allowed guns to shoot if their durability was negative.

Clean up.
Moved around files and folders. Cleaned up various files and classes.

Tactical belt (WIP)
Added files in preparation of tactical belt implementation. Added test world to project files.

Pouch item (WIP)
Minor fixes.
Reserve ammo fix for backpacks.
Small fixes.

Animation update.
Added draw animations. Aiming FOV tweaks. Small fixes.

Animation update.
Renamed some poses. One-handed pose now has smoother transitions for sprinting. Off-hand fix for pistol poses. More sprinting restrictions. Grenades are now thrown with half velocity if crouching.

Sound update.
Updated SFX for: - Tactical Pistol - Automatic Pistol - Assault Rifle Small pistol pose fix.

Attachment update.
Added muzzle break. Added compensator. Slightly refreshed barrel models. Reordered attachment modifiers.

Attachment update.
Added muzzle break. Added compensator. Slightly refreshed barrel models. Reordered attachment modifiers.

Attachment update.
Added muzzle break. Added compensator. Slightly refreshed barrel models.

Sniper rifle update.
Modified ammo stack sizes. Modified rifles' stats. Overhauled grenade model. Started working on sniper rifle model. Added WIP resources and updated test world.

Sniper rifle update.
Overhauled sniper rifle. Modified ammo stack sizes. Buffed gun durability. Modified some gun stats. Overhauled grenade model. Added WIP resources and updated test world. Fixed fire switch sound not used by default.

Grenade sounds.
Added bounce sounds to all grenades. Added custom pinpull sounds to all grenades. Added custom throwing sounds to all grenades. Slightly tweaked sniper rifle model. Removed WIP Resources.

Sound update.
Updated some sounds.

Recoil update.
Reworked recoil mechanics. Updated some sounds. Reduced the time to play pin sound.

Small fixes.
Fixed client and server crash issues with explosions.

Animation update and small fixes.
Updated animations. Updated AR mag models to be longer. Added armor and protection piercing tooltips. Fixed clipping issues with gun workbench. Fixed tint values for automatic pistol. Updated sniper rifle recipe. Updated some sounds.

Attachment update.
Added solid stock and angled grip. Overhauled AR magwell, magazine and shotgun internal models. Slight rebalance of ARs. Further tweaks to new animations.

Attachment update.
Added solid stock and angled grip. Overhauled AR magwell, magazine and shotgun internal models. Various balance changes. Further tweaks to new animations.

Model and sound update.
Added thumb grip. Added an easter egg for unobtainable items. Renamed some models for clarity. Overhauled assault rifle barrel covers. Overhauled sniper rifle extended mag model. Added generic throw sound to all grenades. Rewrote code related to throw sounds. Added scope mount to tactical pistol. Added stock mount to semi auto shotgun.

Model and sound update.
Added thumb grip. Added an easter egg for unobtainable items. Renamed some models for clarity. Overhauled assault rifle barrel covers. Overhauled sniper rifle extended mag model. Added generic throw sound to all grenades. Rewrote code related to throw sounds. Added scope mount to tactical pistol. Added stock mount to semi auto shotgun.

Model and sound update.
Added thumb grip. Added an easter egg for unobtainable items. Renamed some models for clarity. Overhauled assault rifle barrel covers. Overhauled sniper rifle extended mag model. Added generic throw sound to all grenades. Rewrote code related to throw sounds. Added scope mount to tactical pistol. Added stock mount to semi auto shotgun.

Small tweaks and fixes.
Tweaked headshot tooltip to not show for identical damage to base damage. Registered weapon select sound. Added default weapon select sound to Gun.java. Added missing weapon select sound to guns. Added repair kit item class to show a custom tooltip. Updated test world. Updated icons for the mod and WIP resource pack. Slightly reduced horizontal recoil. Changed molotov recipe to use gasoline instead of ethanol.

Grenade update.
Added molotov bounce and break sounds.

Attachment update.
Added skeleton stock. Added modular stock. Added holographic sight. Tweaked other stocks' models. Added fire grenade sounds. Fixed non-functional impact grenade config.

Animation update.
Added recoil animations to all guns. Updated some generic sounds. Overhauled fire mode change to work once when pressed.

Recoil update.
Updated recoil logic. Increased horizontal recoil. Fixed reload related crash.

Mechanics update.
Crouching midair no longer reduces spread. Added explosion radius tooltip to grenades. Changed all diameter tooltips to display radius instead. Balancing regarding explosion radius.

Tweaks.
Reduced fire sound distance config value. Reduced minimal grenade speed to produce bounce sounds. Touched up the modular stock textures. Overhauled the slide on automatic pistol. Reloading now stops and restricts sprinting. The gun is no longer raised when trying to shoot with a broken and loaded gun. Recoil adjustments. Removed several Util classes.

Pistol update.
Added Pistol (WIP). Improved fire setting logic - now explosions can ignite sides of blocks and create fire more consistently. Tweaked molotov light sound. Improved slide movement on all models.

Pistol and spread update.
Finished pistol. Balance changes. Increased durability across the board. Added spread penalties to sprinting and jumping. Added minimal spread penalty while sprinting and jumping. Dynamic crosshair now shows spread much more accurately.

Spread update.
Optimized spread code. Added useSniperSpread: if true, then spreadAdsReduction only affects the restingSpread (this way when you're sprinting/jumping, the penalty is still applied).

Spread update.
Fixed min spread changes with useSniperSpread not affecting the gun stats description. The crosshair no longer renders for useSniperSpread guns with a corresponding config. Changed

Spread update.
Fixed min spread changes with useSniperSpread not affecting the gun stats description. The crosshair no longer renders for useSniperSpread guns with a corresponding config. Changed pistol sights color to white.

Draw update.
Configured drawTime for all guns. Removed redundant code in draw animations. Updated sniper draw animations. Updated tactical pistol hammer model. Updated test world. Temporarily removed the Thumb Grip. Removed mandatory dependencies.

Explosion update.
Fixed waterDamagePenalty stat not working correctly for explosions. Removed collateralMaxPierce. Removed config for rockets and pipe grenades - values are now being read from gun data files. Added explosion radius stat. Brought back ammo item icon to infinite ammo guns. Added a purple tint to HUD ammo counter. Switching fire modes is now restricted while switching/drawing weapons. Code clean up.

UI Update.
Fixed JEI recipe window. Moved grenades to a separate recipe category. Moved all grenade configs to the server side. Updated creative category and workbench icon for guns. Changed some configs. Removed old animations. Improved grenade throw and pin sound playback logic. Improved tech crosshair.

Aiming update.
Improved aiming logic - when a player is aiming using blocks is disabled. Improved shield using logic. Removed flipControls config, as it conflicted with using offhand items. Preparing for ProjectileEntity optimisations.

Small tweaks.
Fixed some tooltips. Touched up some models.

---
Cleanup after code rewrite. Optimized destructible griefing logic for explosions. Reduced stun grenade radius of effect. Fixed explosion radius calculations being wrong.

Explosion and QOL update.
Explosion damage is now more consistent vertically and when hitting entities directly. Increased explosion damage reduction with distance. Slightly reduced grenade throw velocity. Guns now consume ammo, can't be fired when empty and show infinite reserve ammo when in creative. Guns now display their fire mode even if they don't have multiple modes. Changed default attachments screen keybind. Rebalanced explosion damage and radius. Tweaked tags.

MESSAGE.value:
Animation update and small fixes.
Updated animations. Updated AR mag models to be longer. Added armor and protection piercing tooltips. Fixed clipping issues with gun workbench. Fixed tint values for automatic pistol. Updated sniper rifle recipe. Updated some sounds.

Attachment update.
Added solid stock and angled grip. Overhauled AR magwell, magazine and shotgun internal models. Slight rebalance of ARs. Further tweaks to new animations.

Attachment update.
Added solid stock and angled grip. Overhauled AR magwell, magazine and shotgun internal models. Various balance changes. Further tweaks to new animations.

Model and sound update.
Added thumb grip. Added an easter egg for unobtainable items. Renamed some models for clarity. Overhauled assault rifle barrel covers. Overhauled sniper rifle extended mag model. Added generic throw sound to all grenades. Rewrote code related to throw sounds. Added scope mount to tactical pistol. Added stock mount to semi auto shotgun.

Small tweaks and fixes.
Tweaked headshot tooltip to not show for identical damage to base damage. Registered weapon select sound. Added default weapon select sound to Gun.java. Added missing weapon select sound to guns. Added repair kit item class to show a custom tooltip. Updated test world. Updated icons for the mod and WIP resource pack. Slightly reduced horizontal recoil. Changed molotov recipe to use gasoline instead of ethanol.

Grenade update.
Added molotov bounce and break sounds.

Attachment update.
Added skeleton stock. Added modular stock. Added holographic sight. Tweaked other stocks' models. Added fire grenade sounds. Fixed non-functional impact grenade config.

Animation update.
Added recoil animations to all guns. Updated some generic sounds. Overhauled fire mode change to work once when pressed.

Recoil update.
Updated recoil logic. Increased horizontal recoil. Fixed reload related crash.

Mechanics update.
Crouching midair no longer reduces spread. Added explosion radius tooltip to grenades. Changed all diameter tooltips to display radius instead. Balancing regarding explosion radius.

Tweaks.
Reduced fire sound distance config value. Reduced minimal grenade speed to produce bounce sounds. Touched up the modular stock textures. Overhauled the slide on automatic pistol. Reloading now stops and restricts sprinting. The gun is no longer raised when trying to shoot with a broken and loaded gun. Recoil adjustments. Removed several Util classes.

Pistol update.
Added Pistol (WIP). Improved fire setting logic - now explosions can ignite sides of blocks and create fire more consistently. Tweaked molotov light sound. Improved slide movement on all models.

Pistol and spread update.
Finished pistol. Balance changes. Increased durability across the board. Added spread penalties to sprinting and jumping. Added minimal spread penalty while sprinting and jumping. Dynamic crosshair now shows spread much more accurately.

Spread update.
Optimized spread code. Added useSniperSpread: if true, then spreadAdsReduction only affects the restingSpread (this way when you're sprinting/jumping, the penalty is still applied).

Spread update.
Fixed min spread changes with useSniperSpread not affecting the gun stats description. The crosshair no longer renders for useSniperSpread guns with a corresponding config. Changed

Spread update.
Fixed min spread changes with useSniperSpread not affecting the gun stats description. The crosshair no longer renders for useSniperSpread guns with a corresponding config. Changed pistol sights color to white.

Draw update.
Configured drawTime for all guns. Removed redundant code in draw animations. Updated sniper draw animations. Updated tactical pistol hammer model. Updated test world. Temporarily removed the Thumb Grip. Removed mandatory dependencies.

Explosion update.
Fixed waterDamagePenalty stat not working correctly for explosions. Removed collateralMaxPierce. Removed config for rockets and pipe grenades - values are now being read from gun data files. Added explosion radius stat. Brought back ammo item icon to infinite ammo guns. Added a purple tint to HUD ammo counter. Switching fire modes is now restricted while switching/drawing weapons. Code clean up.

UI Update.
Fixed JEI recipe window. Moved grenades to a separate recipe category. Moved all grenade configs to the server side. Updated creative category and workbench icon for guns. Changed some configs. Removed old animations. Improved grenade throw and pin sound playback logic. Improved tech crosshair.

Small tweaks.
Returned explosion knockback functionality. Updated localization files.

Aiming update.
Improved aiming logic - when a player is aiming using blocks is disabled. Improved shield using logic. Removed flipControls config, as it conflicted with using offhand items. Preparing for ProjectileEntity optimisations.

Small tweaks.
Fixed some tooltips. Touched up some models.

Projectile logic rewrite.
Added a new Debug world and removed old Test world. Renamed entity tags. Reworked block breaking logic - now blocks are either fragile and free to destroy or destructible and take up penetration power. There are multiple ap levels to calculate block hardness assigned via tags. Optimized block breaking code in ProjectileEntity.java Improved explosion logic. Improved fire placing logic. Added a lot of comments to ProjectileEntity.java Removed GrenadeEntity.java Projectiles now ignite TNT on hit. Sculk sensors now react to gunfire, throwing grenades, projectile hits. Reduced grenade stack size to 8.

---
Cleanup after code rewrite. Optimized destructible griefing logic for explosions. Reduced stun grenade radius of effect. Fixed explosion radius calculations being wrong.

Explosion and QOL update.
Explosion damage is now more consistent vertically and when hitting entities directly. Increased explosion damage reduction with distance. Slightly reduced grenade throw velocity. Guns now consume ammo, can't be fired when empty and show infinite reserve ammo when in creative. Guns now display their fire mode even if they don't have multiple modes. Changed default attachments screen keybind. Rebalanced explosion damage and radius. Tweaked tags.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Explosion and QOL update.
Explosion damage is now more consistent vertically and when hitting entities directly. Increased explosion damage reduction with distance. Slightly reduced grenade throw velocity. Guns now consume ammo, can't be fired when empty and show infinite reserve ammo when in creative. Guns now display their fire mode even if they don't have multiple modes. Changed default attachments screen keybind. Rebalanced explosion damage and radius. Tweaked tags.
